name: council
description: Council using the Teams API: an Opus captain runs a /deep-research dynamic workflow, an Opus synthesizer reasons over it, clarity gap-checks live, and an Opus janitor trims before delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Council using the Teams API: an Opus captain orchestrates a /deep-research dynamic workflow and an Opus synthesizer tha…
interface.longDescription: Council using the Teams API: an Opus captain orchestrates a /deep-research dynamic workflow and an Opus synthesizer that reconcile via SendMessage across an agent team, an Opus clarity agent asks live follow-ups, and an Opus janitor flags bloat — reactive collaboration instead of fire-and-forget subagents.
